title: cynoglossum petiolatum var. nervosum
intro: Cynoglossum petiolatum var. nervosum, also known as Nerve-toothed Hound's-tongue, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum petiolatum var. nervosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
